goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:30' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 11:30 and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
